title: Peruvian Eggplant Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish from Peru, made with eggplant and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the ground black pepper, soy sauce, and ground aji amarillo pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the eggplant is well coated with the sauce.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and serve hot over rice or with tortillas.
Adjust seasoning as needed with salt and pepper to taste.
